prestazioni: Engine: CUPRA-specific **EA888 Gen3 2.0 TSI (CJXC/CJXD)** with forged internals including **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83mm, 9.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **ARP 2000 head studs** for 400+ HP reliability on E85. Turbo upgrade to **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor, 76mm turbine)** with **TTE500 hybrid turbo kit** for optimized spool and top-end flow. Custom **AEM Infinity 7** standalone ECU with **Motec PDM15** power distribution module for precise fueling and ignition mapping.

Drivetrain: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (CUSCO Type-RS alternative)** with 2.5-way torque bias for aggressive AWD torque split. **South Bend Clutch Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** with **Forgestar F14 19x9.5 ET40 wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (255/35 R19)** for maximum mechanical grip. **034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts** and **Neuspeed RSB (Rear Subframe Bushings)** to eliminate drivetrain deflection under hard launches.

Suspension & Braking: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Leon 5F chassis-specific valving)** with **SuperPro 60mm poly bushings** for camber and toe adjustability. **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front (380mm discs) and 4-piston rear (356mm discs)** big brake kit with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**. **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** and **H&R front strut brace** to eliminate chassis flex during high-G cornering.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning Leon 5F Cupra R-style widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear)** to clear **ET40 Forgestar F14 wheels** and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires**. **Seibon Carbon fiber hood (OEM+ style with functional vents)** and **custom rear diffuser by Maxton Design** with **integrated twin 100mm titanium exhaust tips (Akrapovic Evolution Line)** for weight reduction and aggressive aesthetics.

**Full OEM+ interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (CUPRA-specific bolsters, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** and **custom roll cage by Custom Cages (FIA-spec, bolt-in, 6-point)** for chassis rigidity. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release)** with **AiM MXS Strada dash logger** integrated into the **CUPRA Digital Cockpit**. **LED taillight conversion by VLand (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals)** and **custom front grille delete with carbon fiber mesh (Seibon)** for improved airflow to the **Garrett GTX3582R**.

**Aerodynamic package by Prior Design (PD8XX kit)** including **adjustable carbon fiber front splitter (30mm overhang, 3-stage adjustability)** and **fixed carbon fiber rear wing (1,200mm span, 3D-printed endplates for optimal downforce)**. **Custom vinyl wrap by 3M (Matte Military Green with satin black accents)** and **debadged rear hatch (SEAT lettering removed, CUPRA badge shaved and repainted)**. **LED angel eye headlights (Lux H8 V4, 6,000K, switchback turn signals)** with **custom C-light DRLs (RGB, programmable via App)** for aggressive front-end lighting.
